message:
🌱 surrealdb: Feature: Add lightweight database backend for embedded use (#1900)

* 🌱 Add surrealdb: Feature: Add lightweight database backend for embedded use mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* 🌱 Add surrealdb: Feature: Add lightweight database backend for embedded use mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* Fix surrealdb lightweight backend mission: remove closed PR, fix resolution

- Remove closed PR #1529 (sled implementation, never merged) from sourceUrls
- Replace sled-focused resolution with accurate SurrealKV description
- Update steps to show SurrealKV usage as the actual embedded backend
- Clear stale sled test code snippets from resolution

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,71 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "surrealdb-1445-feature-add-lightweight-database-backend-for-embedded-use",
+  "missionClass": "fixer",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "surrealdb: Feature: Add lightweight database backend for embedded use",
+    "description": "Feature: Add lightweight database backend for embedded use. Requested by 10+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current surrealdb setup",
+        "description": "Verify your surrealdb version and configuration:\n```bash\nsurreal version\n```\nThis feature requires a working surrealdb installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review surrealdb configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant surrealdb configuration:\n### Is your feature request related to a problem?\n\nI am using surrealdb as an embedded database for my application and currently the only backing database option is RocksDB. I'm running into the following problems:\n\n- RocksDB is large."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Use SurrealKV as lightweight embedded backend",
+        "description": "SurrealDB ships with SurrealKV as its lightweight embedded storage engine, replacing the need for RocksDB in embedded use cases. To start SurrealDB with the embedded SurrealKV backend:\n```bash\n# Start with SurrealKV (file-based embedded storage)\nsurreal start --user root --pass root surrealkv://path/to/data.db\n\n# Or use the memory backend for ephemeral data\nsurreal start --user root --pass root memory\n```\nSurrealKV provides a lightweight, pure-Rust embedded key-value store purpose-built for SurrealDB's transaction model. It replaced the earlier RocksDB dependency for embedded use cases and offers smaller binary sizes and simpler deployment."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected.\nConfirm the feature described in \"Feature: Add lightweight database backend for embedded use\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "SurrealDB evaluated Sled as a lightweight embedded backend but determined it was incompatible due to Sled's transaction model limitations. SurrealDB instead built their own embedded storage engine (SurrealKV) which shipped in later versions, providing the lightweight embedded use case requested.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "surrealdb",
+      "community",
+      "multi-model-db",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "surrealdb"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "community",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/surrealdb/surrealdb/issues/1445",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/surrealdb/surrealdb"
+    },
+    "reactions": 10,
+    "comments": 7,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "tools": [
+      "surreal"
+    ],
+    "description": "A working surrealdb installation or development environment."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-04-01T07:06:25.643Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
